data: A stele in the form of a 'horned' altar, in local limestone. The lefthand horn is slightly damaged. The upper part of the face is deocrated with a series of five incised horizontal lines to imitate mouldings. The space between the top two of these is decorated by a broad incised zig-zig. Most of the face is left plain and roughly finished/smoothed, to be occupied by the inscription. There is a projection at the base, partly damaged.
Text on the upper half of the front face, filling the available width, below two large hederae.
Alpha with straight bar; lunate epsilon and sigma; uncial mu and omega; rhomboid omicron, theta and phi.
Contrada Carrubba (), proprieta Fidelio, at km 8 on the Ispica-Pachino road
none, but seen on display (on the stairs) in the museum, 2015.01.13.
I.Sicily with the permission of the Assessorato Regionale dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana - Dipartimento dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana; photo J. Prag 2015-01-13
Comprehensive collection of archaeological material discovered in the province of Ragusa, with a particular focus on the sites of Kaukana, Kamarina, Castiglione and Monte Casasia
Ricerche di antichità e di epigrafia siceliote
Giacomo Manganaro, «Ricerche di antichità e di epigrafia siceliote», Archeologia Classica 17 (1965): 183–210

Apparatus criticus

  • Text based upon photograph

English translation

Jonathan Prag

For my dearest parents, who lived blamelessly towards all their friends. Tryphe, their daughter, made it, for Elpidephoros, who lived 85 years, and Nike who lived for 80 years.

A stele in the form of a 'horned' altar, in local limestone. The lefthand horn is slightly damaged. The upper part of the face is deocrated with a series of five incised horizontal lines to imitate mouldings. The space between the top two of these is decorated by a broad incised zig-zig. Most of the face is left plain and roughly finished/smoothed, to be occupied by the inscription. There is a projection at the base, partly damaged.
